name: vgc
description: Expose VGC Coach skills as repo-local Codex slash commands.

interface.longDescription: Expose the VGC Coach skill set as repo-local Codex slash commands for live meta research, team building, lead planning, team audits, and battle review.
defaultPrompt: Build a VGC team around an anti-meta idea
Review this replay for the key mistakes
Research the current Pokemon Champions meta
